6:["$","div",null,{"className":"prose dark:prose-invert max-w-none","children":[["$","div",null,{"className":"mb-8","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-sm font-medium text-brand-600 dark:text-brand-400 mb-2","children":"Architecture"}],["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight text-zinc-900 dark:text-zinc-100","children":"BEAM Architecture Overview"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"mt-4 text-lg text-zinc-600 dark:text-zinc-400 leading-relaxed","children":"BEAM (Biological-inspired Episodic-Associative Memory) is the core architecture powering Mnemosyne. 13:I[35250,["/_next/static/chunks/0fx4xc-kwoar9.js","/_next/static/chunks/0n4z.7yu76je-.js","/_next/static/chunks/0x.2q9jb~6ekr.js","/_next/static/chunks/09z4kwq9sy.a2.js","/_next/static/chunks/0fekzj03ltn5y.js","/_next/static/chunks/0pqew2nbfoy2f.js","/_next/static/chunks/07.05twov8012.js","/_next/static/chunks/113wy2s~ukj5p.js","/_next/static/chunks/0se1rt9lzyib_.js","/_next/static/chunks/0e1gsufr5shdc.js","/_next/static/chunks/13n60-fppanm4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0g~f0923b0wjv.js"],"MermaidDiagram"]
11:[["$","h1",null,{"children":"BEAM Architecture Overview"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"BEAM (Biological-inspired Episodic-Associative Memory) is the core architecture powering Mnemosyne. It models human memory organization with four distinct tiers, each optimized for different retention and retrieval patterns."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["The Four Memory Tiers",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","$L13",null,{}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Working Memory",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The agent's immediate context window. Holds recent observations, conversation history, and active tool results. Fastest access (<100ms), limited capacity (~1000 entries), and subject to eviction."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Latency"}],": Sub-100ms median"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Capacity"}],": Configurable (default 1000 entries)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Eviction"}],": LRU with importance weighting"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Persistence"}],": Survives process restarts via SQLite"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Episodic Memory",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Long-term storage for experiences, conversations, and events. Organized chronologically with rich metadata. Uses hybrid retrieval combining vector similarity and full-text search."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Retention"}],": Permanent (until explicit deletion)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Retrieval"}],": Hybrid (vector + FTS5)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Compression"}],": AAAK algorithm for context windows"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Consolidation"}],": Automatic during sleep cycles"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Semantic Memory",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Structured knowledge extracted from experiences. Stores facts, relationships, and concepts as a temporal knowledge graph with subject-predicate-object triples."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Format"}],": Temporal knowledge graph (triples)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Query"}],": Graph traversal + vector similarity"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Update"}],": Incremental fact extraction from Working Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Schema"}],": Flexible, no predefined ontology"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Scratchpad",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"A temporary workspace for reasoning, planning, and intermediate computations. Analogous to human working memory's manipulation buffer."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Key characteristics:"}]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Lifetime"}],": Session-bound (cleared on agent restart)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Use case"}],": Chain-of-thought, planning, scratch calculations"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Integration"}],": Flushes insights to Working Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Isolation"}],": Per-agent, not shared"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Data Flow",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c"]
1d:I[5014,["/_next/static/chunks/0fx4xc-kwoar9.js","/_next/static/chunks/0n4z.7yu76je-.js","/_next/static/chunks/0x.2q9jb~6ekr.js","/_next/static/chunks/09z4kwq9sy.a2.js","/_next/static/chunks/0fekzj03ltn5y.js","/_next/static/chunks/0pqew2nbfoy2f.js","/_next/static/chunks/07.05twov8012.js","/_next/static/chunks/113wy2s~ukj5p.js","/_next/static/chunks/0se1rt9lzyib_.js","/_next/static/chunks/0e1gsufr5shdc.js","/_next/static/chunks/13n60-fppanm4.js","/_next/static/chunks/0g~f0923b0wjv.js"],"default"]
14:["$","$L13",null,{}]
15:["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Sleep Consolidation",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne runs background \"sleep\" cycles that:"}]
17:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Compress"}]," Working Memory entries using AAAK algorithm"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promote"}]," high-importance entries to Episodic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Extract"}]," facts and relationships to Semantic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Evict"}]," low-importance entries per retention policy"]}],"\n"]}]
18:["$","p",null,{"children":["Configure interval via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_CONSOLIDATION_INTERVAL"}]," (default: 3600s)."]}]
19:["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Design Philosophy",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}]
1a:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne's architecture prioritizes:"}]
1b:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Locality"}],": All data in SQLite — no network calls for retrieval"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Transparency"}],": Every operation is inspectable and debuggable"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Efficiency"}],": Sub-100ms retrieval for typical workloads"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Flexibility"}],": Works standalone or as a Hermes plugin"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Privacy"}],": No data leaves your machine by default"]}],"\n"]}]
1c:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L1d",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Comparison with Vector-Only Stores"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Unlike pure vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate), Mnemosyne combines dense embeddings with structured storage, full-text search, and temporal relationships. This hybrid approach delivers more precise retrieval for agent use cases where exact facts matter as much as semantic similarity."}]}]]}]]}]}]
c:[["$","meta","0",{"charSet":"utf-8"}],["$","meta","1",{"name":"viewport","content":"width=device-width, initial-scale=1"}]]
1e:I[27201,["/_next/static/chunks/0fx4xc-kwoar9.js","/_next/static/chunks/0n4z.7yu76je-.js"],"IconMark"]
